title: 来盘章鱼牌吧 · 卡牌数据
note: 卡牌、能力、阵营、领袖与微信小游戏《来盘章鱼牌吧》保持一致；由 tools/build-cards.js 从小程序数据生成。图片走 assets/card-icons 软链，运行时读取本地卡图。

Northern Realms.perkText: 赢得一个回合后抽 1 张牌。

Nilfgaardian Empire.perkText: 平局时视为本派获胜；双方同派时仍为平局。

Scoia'tael.theme: 思想、学派、改革与文化影响
Scoia'tael.perkText: 可以决定先手；当前引擎中体现为该派默认先手。

Monsters.theme: 义军、豪杰、民间号召与不灭火种
Monsters.perkText: 每回合结束后随机保留 1 张非出使单位到下一回合。

Skellige.theme: 史家、医家、科技、制度遗产与后发复兴
Skellige.perkText: 第 3 回合开始时从弃牌堆随机复起 2 张非传世单位。

Neutral.theme: 跨派人物、时局牌与通用谋略牌

siege.theme: 思想、科技、文化、医学、工程

cards.name: 田单
cards.abilityText: 奇策：若对方疆场总战力达到 10 或以上，摧毁其疆场当前战力最高的非传世人物。

cards.name: 杨戬
cards.abilityText: 召唤啸天犬（杨戬离开战场后，下一回合开始召唤一张战力 8 的啸天犬）

cards.name: 方腊
cards.abilityText: 奇策：若对方朝堂总战力达到 10 或以上，摧毁其朝堂当前战力最高的非传世人物。

cards.name: 祖逖
cards.abilityText: 奋起：被破釜触发后转化为 14 点振势人物。

cards.name: 岳飞
cards.abilityText:
传世：战力恒为 10，不受时局、鼓舞、振势、同盟等影响，也不会被奇策、请辞、济世选中。
召唤岳家军：打出后从己方手牌和牌库中把所有「岳家军」一起部署到「疆场」阵线。

cards.name: 郑芝龙
cards.abilityText: 奇策：若对方朝堂总战力达到 10 或以上，摧毁其朝堂当前战力最高的非传世人物。

cards.name: 岳家军
cards.abilityText: 岳家军：同盟——同一阵线的「岳家军」越多，每张战力翻倍越高。也可被岳飞的「召唤岳家军」从手牌、牌库中一并部署。

cards.name: 岳家军
cards.abilityText: 岳家军：同盟——同一阵线的「岳家军」越多，每张战力翻倍越高。也可被岳飞的「召唤岳家军」从手牌、牌库中一并部署。

cards.name: 岳家军
cards.abilityText: 岳家军：同盟——同一阵线的「岳家军」越多，每张战力翻倍越高。也可被岳飞的「召唤岳家军」从手牌、牌库中一并部署。

cards.name: 李时珍
cards.abilityText: 传世、破釜：打出后触发所在朝堂线奋起人物转化。

cards.abilityText: 破釜：选择一条阵线，触发该线所有奋起人物转化。

cards.name: 刘邦
cards.abilityText: 从牌组选择 1 张党争迷局并立即打出。
cards.leaderAbility: Pick an Impenetrable Fog card from your deck and play it instantly.

cards.name: 李世民
cards.abilityText: 清除场上全部时局效果。
cards.leaderAbility: Clear any weather effects in play.

cards.name: 嬴政
cards.leaderAbility: Doubles the strength of all your Siege units unless a Commander's Horn is also present.

cards.name: 赵匡胤
cards.abilityText: 摧毁对方文脉线最强人物。
cards.leaderAbility: Destroy your enemy strongest Siege unit if the combined strength is 10 or more.

cards.name: 刘彻
cards.abilityText: 摧毁对方朝堂线最强人物。
cards.leaderAbility: Destroy your enemy strongest Ranged unit if the combined strength is 10 or more.

cards.name: 张仪
cards.abilityText: 侦察对手随机 3 张手牌。
cards.leaderAbility: Look at 3 random cards from your opponent's hand.

cards.name: 曹操
cards.abilityText: 从牌组选择 1 张典籍散佚并立即打出。
cards.leaderAbility: Pick a Torrential Rain card from your deck and play it instantly.

cards.name: 秦昭襄王
cards.abilityText: 双方济世复归改为随机目标。
cards.leaderAbility: Abilities that restore a unit from the discard pile restore a randomly-chosen unit.

cards.name: 管仲
cards.abilityText: 从对手弃牌堆取回 1 张人物到手牌。
cards.leaderAbility: Draw a card from your opponent's discard pile.

cards.name: 司马懿
cards.leaderAbility: Cancel your opponent's Leader Ability.

cards.name: 孔子
cards.leaderAbility: Draw an extra card at the beginning of the battle.

cards.name: 惠施
cards.abilityText: 将己方通才人物移动到更优战线。
cards.leaderAbility: Move agile units to whatever valid row maximizes their strength.

cards.name: 老子
cards.abilityText: 从牌组选择 1 张边患四起并立即打出。
cards.leaderAbility: Pick a Biting Frost card from your deck and play it instantly.

cards.name: 韩非
cards.abilityText: 摧毁对方疆场线最强人物。
cards.leaderAbility: Destroy your enemy strongest Close Combat unit if the combined strength is 10 or more.

cards.name: 墨子
cards.leaderAbility: Doubles the strength of all your Ranged units unless a Commander's Horn is also present.

cards.name: 朱元璋
cards.abilityText: 双方出使人物战力翻倍。
cards.leaderAbility: Doubles the strength of all Spy cards on both sides.

cards.name: 刘秀
cards.abilityText: 从己方弃牌堆取回 1 张人物到手牌。
cards.leaderAbility: Restore a card from your discard pile to your hand.

cards.name: 项羽
cards.leaderAbility: Doubles the strength of all your Close Combat units unless a Commander's Horn is also present.

cards.name: 黄巢
cards.abilityText: 弃置 2 张手牌并抽 1 张牌。
cards.leaderAbility: Discard 2 cards then draw a card of your choice.

cards.name: 陈胜
cards.abilityText: 从牌组选择任意 1 张时局牌并立即打出。
cards.leaderAbility: Pick any weather card from your deck and play it instantly.

cards.name: 司马迁
cards.abilityText: 双方弃牌堆洗回各自牌库。
cards.leaderAbility: Shuffle all cards from each player graveyard back into their decks.

cards.name: 张居正
cards.abilityText: 己方单位在恶劣时局下仅损失一半战力。
cards.leaderAbility: Units lose only half their strength during bad weather.

tokens.name: 背水死士
tokens.abilityText: 奋起转化：战力 14；为同一阵线其他非传世人物各加 1 点战力。

tokens.name: 背水锐卒
tokens.abilityText: 奋起转化：战力 8；同名背水锐卒在同一阵线并列时战力倍增。

tokens.name: 啸天犬
tokens.abilityText: 杨戬离开战场后于下一回合召唤的灵犬，战力固定为 8。
